headline_seed: Tropical Storm Bertha forms off the Florida coast, prompting storm alerts - ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Videos
draft_text:
Tropical Storm Bertha formed Monday in the Gulf of Mexico, 110 miles south of Panama City, with 40 mph winds. AP and Axios confirm a surge watch spans the Mississippi River mouth to the Alabama-Florida border — up to 4 feet.

And that's the mews.
